case_title: CAROLINE SAM VS. ROBERT G PETERSON

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM, CAROLINE AS TRUSTEE OF THE SAM FAMILY BYPASS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, ROBERT G

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAM, CAROLINE AS TRUSTEE OF THE SAM FAMILY BYPASS TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSON, ROBERT G THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 235 19TH AVENUE, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94121 (CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAM, CAROLINE AS TRUSTEE OF THE SAM FAMILY BYPASS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, ROBERT G ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
